about.heading: About the Event
about.body: [PLACEHOLDER: short paragraph on TEDxAlFalah Youth, its purpose, and who it serves — to be provided by the client.]
about.licenseNote: TEDxAlFalah Youth is organized independently and operated under license from TED.

theme.title: Tomorrow, Now: Young voices. Real ideas. The future starts earlier than we think.
theme.body: In the UAE, youth are inventing, creating, performing, competing, and asking bold questions. TEDxYouth is a stage for their ideas and stories. Real experiences that inspire young people and remind adults how powerful youth voices can be.

highlights.venueTeaser: [PLACEHOLDER: short teaser about the venue and why it was chosen.]

contactForm.heading: Contact Us
contactForm.successBody: Thanks for reaching out — we'll get back to you soon.
contactForm.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
contactForm.messageMinLength: Message must be at least 10 characters

notFound.title: This idea hasn't found its stage yet.
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved. Let's get you back to something worth exploring.

contact.title: Message Sent
contact.body: Thanks for reaching out — we'll get back to you soon.

apply.title: Application Received
apply.body: Thank you for applying to TEDxAlFalah Youth. A confirmation email is on its way to you, and we'll follow up according to the timeline on the Apply page.

partner.title: Thank You for Your Interest
partner.body: Our partnerships team will review your message and be in touch soon.

tickets.title: You're Registered!
tickets.body: We'll send event details to your email. See you there!
